zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Donges於大約1205年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可沙吉納載爾時，她的父親Roald III de DONGES32歲，母親Tiphaine de RETZ22歲。她和Thibault de ROCHEFORT I至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。她去世在法國布列塔尼莫比韓瓦斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Donges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German (also Dönges): variant of Tonjes . Compare Doenges .

variants.name: Tonjes
meanings: North German, East Frisian, and North Frisian (Tönjes): patronymic from a shortened pet form of the personal name Antonius (see Anthony ). The surname Tönjes is very rare in North Frisia. Compare Toenjes .

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Donges was born about 1205, in Saint-Nazaire, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Roald III de DONGES, was 32 and her mother, Tiphaine de RETZ, was 22. She had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Thibault de ROCHEFORT I. She died in Vannes, Morbihan, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Donges est née environ 1205, à Saint-Nazaire, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Roald III de DONGES, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Tiphaine de RETZ, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Thibault de ROCHEFORT I. Elle est décédée à Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de Donges um 1205 in Saint-Nazaire, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roald III de DONGES 32 und ihre Mutter Tiphaine de RETZ 22. Sie hatte mit Thibault de ROCHEFORT I mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb in Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Donges è nata il circa 1205 nel Saint-Nazaire, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Roald III de DONGES, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Tiphaine de RETZ, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Thibault de ROCHEFORT I. Morì nel Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Dongesが約1205年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーロイアーエ-アトランティクサイント-ナザイアーで生まれた時，父Roald III de DONGESは32歳，母Tiphaine de RETZは22歳であった。彼女はThibault de ROCHEFORT Iとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女はフランスブレタグンモービハンヴァンスで死去した。

ko.Donges, Saint-Nazaire, Loire-Atlantique,: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 세인트-나제이르
ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Donges(이)가 대략 1205년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 세인트-나제이르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roald III de DONGES(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Tiphaine de RETZ(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Thibault de ROCHEFORT I(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 버네스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Donges nasceu aproximadamente 1205, em Saint-Nazaire, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Roald III de DONGES, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Tiphaine de RETZ, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Thibault de ROCHEFORT I. Ela faleceu em Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, França.

ru.Donges, Saint-Nazaire, Loire-Atlantique,: сеинт-назеир, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Donges родилась около 1205 г. в местности сеинт-назеир, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Roald III de DONGES было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Tiphaine de RETZ, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Thibault de ROCHEFORT I. Она умерла в местности ваннесь, морбихань, бретагн, Франция.
